DESCRIPTION Each stone of this type is keyed to a particular kind of weapon (heavy flail, light crossbow, short sword, and so on) and grants you proficiency with that weapon. Cracked: The stone grants the wearer weapon familiarity with the keyed weapon (it is treated as a martial weapon for him). Price: 1,500 gp. Flawed: This stone grants proficiency with the keyed weapon and gives the wearer a â2 penalty to Dexterity. Price: 3,000 gp. See Inferior Ioun Stones for details on cracked and flawed variant stones. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, transformation or proficiency in the appropriate weapon; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 5,000 gp
